---
title: "Emma Tupone"
description: "Contributor to the NYC Open Data Lab"
---

## Projects & Publications

-   [Environmental Stressors and Social Complaints in New York City](https://martinezc1-nyc-open-data-student-gallery.share.connect.posit.cloud/chapters/07-EnvironmentalStressorsandSocialComplaintsNYC-Emma.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Portfolio

A curated collection of work developed using reproducible workflows in R and Quarto.

-   📘 [View Portfolio Book](https://019b2f1f-f2b9-d61a-d328-03690c0bd6da.share.connect.posit.cloud/index.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Contributions to the Lab

-   Contributor to the NYC Open Data Student Gallery\
-   Contributor to the development of the nycOpenData R package

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/emmatup0205)\
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/emma-tupone-1353a1291/)\
-   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0001-7207-0986)
